description: Product Description When fighting breakouts, faster is better. Clearasil Rapid Action Gel Wash works in as little as 12 hours. It works fast to open blocked pores through rapid delivery of spot fighting ingredient. It also keeps working through the day. Dermatologist tested Ingredients Aqua, glycerin, sodium laureth sulfate, coco-glucoside, cocamidopropyl betaine, salicylic acid, PEG-200 hydrogenated glyceryl palmate, sodium chloride, laureth-4, peg-7 glyceryl cocoate, polyquaternium-43, parfum, lavandula stoechas extract, helichrysum italicum extract, cistus monspeliensis extract, sodium hydroxide, phenoxyethanol, methylparaben, butylparaben, ethylparaben, isobutylparaben, propylparaben, CI 42090. Directions Use everyday in the morning and evening for visibly clearer skin. Wet face. Dispense product into hands, lather and massage gently onto face avoiding the eye area. Rinse thoroughly with warm water. Gently pat dry. Safety Warning Store in a cool dry place. Do not store in direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes and mouth. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. If skin irritation occurs, discontinue use. If irritation persists, consult a doctor. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical assistance. Wash hands after use. Box Contains 1 x Clearasil Ultra Rapid Action Gel Wash 150 ml See more
